title: Configuring a cgroup driver — Migrating to thesystemddriver
text:
To change the cgroup driver of an existing kubeadm cluster from
cgroupfs
to
systemd
in-place,
a similar procedure to a kubelet upgrade is required. This must include both
steps outlined below.

Call
kubectl edit cm kubelet-config -n kube-system
.
Either modify the existing
cgroupDriver
value or add a new field that looks like this:
cgroupDriver
:
systemd
This field must be present under the
kubelet:
section of the ConfigMap.
Call
kubectl edit cm kubelet-config -n kube-system
.
Either modify the existing
cgroupDriver
value or add a new field that looks like this:
cgroupDriver
:
systemd
This field must be present under the
kubelet:
section of the ConfigMap.
